title: Migrate from Service Workers to ES Modules
excerpt: title: Migrate from Service Workers to ES Modules description: Write your Worker code in ES modules syntax for an optimized experience. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. This guide will show you how to migrate your Workers from the [Service Worker ↗](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Service%5FWorker%5FAPI) format to the [ES modules ↗](https://blog.cloudflare.com/workers-javascript-modules/) format.
